name: Aris Mining Corporation
description: Aris Mining Corporation is a Canadian mining company, headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, focused on the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of gold properties. The company operates the Segovia Operations and Marmato Mine in Colombia, and is developing the Soto Norte gold-copper project in Colombia and the Toroparu gold project in Guyana. Aris Mining is committed to sustainable development and maintaining strong relationships with local communities and artisanal miners.
